PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/login -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match 'name="email"' -and $html -match 'name="password"'\) { "Form de login renderiza OK" } else { "ERROR: form no encontrado" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/dashboard -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -UseBasicParsing; "GET /dashboard sin sesion: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "GET /dashboard sin sesion: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
